画像をドラッグ＆ドロップするだけでAI動画を生成するアプリです。\n生成はすべて:
This is an app that generates AI videos just by dragging and dropping images.
All generation is done on your local PC.
Input images and generated videos are never sent externally.
画像をドロップして動画化するとき、裏側では実際にこのComfyUIワークフローが: When you drop an image and turn it into a video, this ComfyUI workflow is actually used behind the scenes. Open each node and adjust the values ​​directly, then "Save and Apply" to have them reflected in the next generation. (makeAiFactory_api_source.json)

When you drop an image and turn it into a video, this ComfyUI workflow is actually used behind the scenes. You can directly adjust the value for each node using the knobs and input fields from the button below.
